nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for local and production setup, defining Supabase client credentials (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) and the server-only GOLDAPI_KEY for the world XAU/USD price API.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents two naming conventions for Supabase keys and warns that real secrets must never be committed to Git.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation covering local Express development (npm start), deployment environment variables, frontend route map, legacy URL redirects, and the Supabase-backed News CMS module with schema setup, block renderer, SEO, and security notes.

nodes.name: gia-vang-hom-nay.html
nodes.summary: Legacy redirect page that immediately forwards visitors from the old 'gia-vang-hom-nay' URL to /sanpham/gia-vang via meta refresh and JavaScript location.replace, with minimal SEO meta and a fallback link.

nodes.name: googlea755d9afb0a19369.html
nodes.summary: Google Search Console site verification file containing a single google-site-verification token used to prove domain ownership to Google.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main homepage and primary site entry point at /. Renders the full TLKV marketing shell with hero carousel, live gold pricing table, world XAU/USD widget, featured products grid, news preview, and rich SEO metadata including JSON-LD WebSite schema.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads 14 stylesheets and 17 JavaScript modules spanning gold data, product catalog, news preview, and site navigation.

nodes.name: local.css
nodes.summary: Site-wide CSS override layer loaded after the design system and vendor styles. Enforces light-mode rendering, styles gold pricing tables and TV display layouts, product card grids, modal overlays, and numerous TLKV-branded UI components.
nodes.languageNotes: Acts as a catch-all override file referenced by index.html, tv-model.html, and included in the Vercel serverless bundle.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node.js project manifest for the thanh-long-kim-viet-gold demo site. Declares Express server entry via npm start, Node >=18.17 engine requirement, and dependencies on express, dotenv, @supabase/supabase-js, and undici.

nodes.name: tv-model.html
nodes.summary: Full-screen TV display page for in-store gold price boards. Shows a branded header, live gold rate table populated by tv-gold-board.js, a welcome marquee, and Supabase-backed real-time price polling with noindex robots directive.
nodes.languageNotes: Configures lean gold push polling (15s interval) and initializes TLKVTvGoldBoard.initTvModelPage on load.

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration that builds server.js as a Node.js serverless function with a 60-second max duration, bundles static assets (HTML, CSS, JS, data, admin, tin-tuc), and routes all traffic through the Express server.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a catch-all route pattern directing every request to server.js for unified Express routing.
